verified.name: National Grid ESO
verified.tagline: Great Britain's electricity system operator open data, CKAN-style
verified.description: The operator formerly known as National Grid ESO (now NESO) publishes Britain's grid data through a standard CKAN API. List every dataset with a single keyless GET, then drill into wind forecasts, demand, carbon intensity and more. No key, no signup.
verified.dataLicense: NESO Open Data Licence (OGL-based); varies per dataset

verified.name: City, Berlin
verified.tagline: Berlin's open data catalog via a plain CKAN API
verified.description: Berlin's official open data register runs on CKAN, so a single keyless GET returns the names of every published dataset. From there you can reach 3D building models, transit, demographics and thousands more city datasets. No key or account needed.

verified.name: FBI Wanted
verified.tagline: Live feed of the FBI's Wanted program, no key required
verified.description: The FBI exposes its public Wanted list as clean JSON: fugitives, missing persons, reward text, physical descriptions and photos. A keyless GET returns a paginated list of roughly 1,200 active cases. Data comes straight from fbi.gov.

items.title: PATRICK CARLOW, SR.
items.reward_text: The FBI is offering a reward of up to $2...

verified.name: Istanbul (İBB) Open Data
verified.tagline: Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality open data, CKAN-powered
verified.description: The İBB (Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality) publishes city datasets through a standard CKAN API. A keyless package search returns titles, owning departments and resource counts across 500-plus datasets. Great for transit, environment and municipal statistics.

results.title: VetAkademi Kapsamında Eğitim Verilen Kişi Sayısı
results.name: vetakademi-kapsaminda-egitim-verilen-kisi-sayisi

verified.name: Open Government, Argentina
verified.tagline: Argentina's national open data portal over CKAN
verified.description: datos.gob.ar is Argentina's central government open data catalog, served through a standard CKAN API. A keyless package search returns dataset titles, slugs and resource counts across 1,200-plus datasets. Covers prices, budgets, geography and more.

verified.name: Open Government, Denmark
verified.tagline: Danish municipal open data through a CKAN API
verified.description: opendata.dk aggregates open data from Danish municipalities on a CKAN backend. A keyless package search returns dataset titles, slugs and resource counts across 600-plus datasets. Handy for local transport, planning and civic data.

verified.name: District of Columbia Open Data
verified.tagline: Washington DC's GIS datasets as queryable ArcGIS JSON
verified.description: Washington DC serves its open datasets through public ArcGIS REST feature services. This keyless query hits the Metropolitan Police crime-incidents layer and returns structured JSON with offense, method, shift and block. Swap the layer id for other city data.

attributes.BLOCK: 12TH STREET NE AND VARNUM STREET NE
